race.description: Landsborough Pub Qtis Two-Year-Old Mdn Hcp
race.comment: Tricky race to kick off the card with many of these babies facing the starter for the first time. Of the raced brigade WOOTTON YOU KNOW (7) is drawn to get all the favours from the inside alley and has race experience over a lot of these. Top-three candidate. IF SHE DARES (11) is on debut but has shown ability at the trials and a watch on betting is advised. ELEVATING (10) daughter of Russian Revolution from Upgrading on debut. Ran second at recent trial and stable have a strong strike rate with the first starters. FLYING FORWARD (15) Two-year-old Tassort gelding on debut. Trialled okay at Doomben recently. Monitor any market moves.
